sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT lang FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT timeZone FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE property_name = 'DomainName' AND property_value = #DOMAIN_NAME#
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, server_name serverName FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, tenant_name tenantName FROM TBL_TENANT
SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #property_value# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND userID = #userID#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_company_config` ( `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `PROPERTY_VALUE` varchar(2000) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`,`PROPERTY_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
ALTER TABLE TBL_FORMINFO ADD REFORMFLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #propertyValue# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN (TENANT_ID, USER_ID, LOGIN_TIME) VALUES (#tenantID#, #userID#, #loginTime#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID = #userID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LOGIN_TIME FROM TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID = #userID#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN ( TENANT_ID MEDIUMINT(5), USER_ID VARCHAR(80), LOGIN_TIME VARCHAR(15) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID, TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION ADD MAIL VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD ORDERBY VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD PROXY VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `tbl_access_ip` ( `IPNO` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `IPADDRESS` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `ACCESS` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'YES', `EXPLANATION` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`IPNO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_distribution_sub` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_MAIL` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `SUB_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`SUB_MAIL`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`), CONSTRAINT `FK_distribution_sub` FOREIGN KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) REFERENCES `jmocha_distribution` (`DOMAIN_NAME`, `USER_NAME`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_DEPTMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `jmocha`.`jmocha_mail_signature_template` ( `sign_no` INT(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `content` LONGTEXT NULL, `displayname` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `displayname2` VARCHAR(45) NULL, `tenant_id` MEDIUMINT(5) NULL, `company_id` VARCHAR(45) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`sign_no`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_user_jobmaster` ( `JOBID` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `TYPE` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `CN` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DISPLAYNAME2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `USEFLAG` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `SORT` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `CREATEDATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`JOBID`,`TYPE`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_config (tenant_id, property_name, property_value, description, config_name, regdate, config_type) VALUES (#tenantID#, #confName#, #property_value#, #description#, #config_name#, #regdate#, #config_type#)
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD PASSWORD_UPDATEDT DATETIME DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD JOBID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `tbl_webfolder_token` ( `USERID` varchar(32) NOT NULL, `LTOKEN` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL, `REGDATA` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `COMPID` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANTID` varchar(45) NOT NULL, `DEVICE` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`USERID`,`TENANTID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_MAIL_GENERAL ADD PREVIEW_MAIL_IMAGE VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Y'
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAILBOXQUOTA, MAILBOXUSAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET ADD IS_FIXED INT DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD ( MAILBOXQUOTA VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, MAILBOXUSAGE VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_HOLIDAYLIST' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'HOLIDAYFLAG'
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOLIDAYLIST ADD HOLIDAYFLAG VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_HOLIDAYLIST' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'HOLIDAYREPEAT'
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOLIDAYLIST ADD HOLIDAYREPEAT VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `tbl_portal_theme_portlet` ( `theme_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` mediumint(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `company_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `portlet_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `portlet_used` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `portlet_order` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `menu_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `is_fixed` int(11) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`theme_id`,`tenant_id`,`company_id`,`portlet_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
ALTER TABLE TBL_JOURNAL_FORM ADD ( form_del_flag VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT menu_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE menu_url LIKE '%taskIndex%' AND menu_id = 17 LIMIT 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menu_url = '/ezTask/taskIndex.do' WHERE menu_id = 17
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD PORTLET_USED int(11) DEFAULT 1
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD THEME_ID int(11) DEFAULT 1
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER DROP PRIMARY KEY
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD PRIMARY KEY(user_id, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_id, theme_id)
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER ADD is_default int(11) DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'StartDate' AND NAME = '기안일시'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'FunctionTypeName'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET NAME = '수신일자', NAME2 = 'ProcessDate', NAME3 = '到着日時', NAME4 = '接收日' WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'StartDate' AND NAME = '기안일시'
UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET COLNAME = 'FunctionType' WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'FunctionTypeName'
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK ADD LINKORDER INT(11) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_C_COMCLOSE ADD COMPANYID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT, DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT, USER_TOTAL_LIMIT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG LIMIT 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG CHANGE COLUMN TOTAL_LIMIT USER_TOTAL_LIMIT VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER ADD COLUMN TYPE VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, DROP PRIMARY KEY, ADD PRIMARY KEY(CN, TENANT_ID, TYPE)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM( SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'jmocha' AND TABLE_NAME = 'JAMES_MAIL_SEARCH' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'MESSAGE_ID' ) existsYN
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE JAMES_MAIL_SEARCH ADD COLUMN MESSAGE_ID VARCHAR(200) NULL DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_FORMINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION INT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION INT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION INT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION INT NULL DEFAULT 0
